mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_song_request (sender_id, receiver_id, raw_input, ai_song, ai_artist, request_message, status) VALUES (#{senderId}, #{receiverId}, #{rawInput}, #{aiSong}, #{aiArtist}, #{requestMessage}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT id, sender_id, receiver_id, raw_input, ai_song, ai_artist, request_message, status, created_at FROM t_song_request WHERE id = #{id}

SELECT sr.id, sr.sender_id, sr.receiver_id, sr.raw_input, sr.ai_song, sr.ai_artist, sr.request_message, sr.status, sr.created_at, u.username AS receiver_name FROM t_song_request sr INNER JOIN t_user u ON u.id = sr.receiver_id WHERE sr.sender_id = #{userId} ORDER BY sr.created_at DESC

SELECT sr.id, sr.sender_id, sr.receiver_id, sr.raw_input, sr.ai_song, sr.ai_artist, sr.request_message, sr.status, sr.created_at, u.username AS sender_name FROM t_song_request sr INNER JOIN t_user u ON u.id = sr.sender_id WHERE sr.receiver_id = #{userId} ORDER BY sr.created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE t_song_request SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id} AND receiver_id = #{receiverId}
